untranslatable_reason: Sibbett's Demand Index requires calculation of upside volume vs downside volume at the daily level. The allowed indicators do not include upside_volume, downside_volume, or a pre-calculated Demand Index. The signal requires volume decomposition by price direction (up/down days) which is not available in the allowed indicator set. Only vol_ratio_20 and hvol_20 are available, neither of which implement this specific calculation.
translation_notes: Signal ID KAUFMAN_DRY_12 describes a custom volume-based oscillator (Sibbett's Demand Index) that requires: (1) identification of up vs down days, (2) summation of volume on up days over 10-period lookback, (3) summation of volume on down days over same period, (4) ratio calculation. Without upside_volume and downside_volume primitives or a pre-computed Demand Index indicator, this cannot be expressed using allowed indicators. The signal is direction-agnostic (CONTEXT_DEPENDENT) and lacks defined thresholds for entry/exit, further limiting implementation.
